headline: Stop the bleeding, start the climb today
summary: You're at -0.06 kg/week but need -0.60 kg/week; today's eating discipline and 45 minutes of rowing are non-negotiable.
details: First: Replace emotional eating with Huel pre-portioned meals today—no snacking, no exceptions, no loopholes. Second: 45 minutes on the rowing machine this morning; your desk work means movement must be deliberate and daily, not optional. Third: You're 1,819 days behind schedule with only 387 days left to reach 88 kg; every single day you delay is a day you won't get back.
